message:
refactor: unify executor across local and worker, fix review findings

- Add formatMap option to executeCode so worker can coerce excalidraw→url
- Delete executeCodeInWorker from worker — imports shared executeCode instead
- Remove dead Diagram import from src/index.ts
- Standardize typeof process check in sdk.ts validation logging
- Build labelTextById map in fromFile to eliminate duplicate elements.find
- Hoist WasmLayoutOutputSchema to module level in layout.ts
- Remove unnecessary temp variable in callWasm
